parents.subject: LU-16112 build: ki_complete removed unused argument

commit.subject: LU-16113 build: Update lock_page_memcg configure test
commit.message:
LU-16113 build: Update lock_page_memcg configure test

Newer kernels such as 5.16 fail the compile test with:

ERROR: modpost: "lock_page_memcg" [../build/conftest.ko] undefined!

Change the test so it does not require the modpost result.

Alternatively a dummy Module.symvers can be generated to
resolve the modpost failure.

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-11189
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ibc74ef07a1408e1b2b837d313fee0c49025eef76
